REPLY TO OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO QUASH SUPOENA FOR PRODUCTION OF EMPLOYMENT RECORDS (TRANSACTION ID # 17290004) FILED BY PLAINTIFF REMSING, DAVID GARY

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF DAVID REMSING'S MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS FOR PRODUCTION OF EMPLOYMENT RECORDS IS GRANTED IN PART, DENIED IN PART AND STIPULATED IN PART. PLAINTIFF SHALL PRODUCE ANY AND ALL DOCUMENTS RELATING TO HIS PHYSICAL ABILITY OR LIMITATIONS TO PERFORM HIS DUTIES FROM COMMENCEMENT OF EMPLOYMENT, INCLUDING JOB APPLICATION TO THE END OF EMPLOYMENT. THE MOTION IS DENIED AS TO THE REMAINDER OF THE PERSONNEL FILE. THE PARTIES STIPULATE IN OPEN COURT TO PRODUCTION OF PAYROLL RECORDS, 1099 FORMS, ATTENDANCE RECORDS AND ANY WORKMAN'S COMPENSATION RECORDS. THE COURT ORDERS COMPLIANCE WITHIN 21 DAYS OF ENTRY OF WRITTEN ORDER. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM AND THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. THE [PROPOSED] ORDER SHALL BE SUBMITTED BY EMAIL IN WORD (.DOC) FORMAT, DIRECTLY TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT: NGRAY@SHADESOFGRAY.LAW. JUDGE PRO TEM: NAOMI JANE GRAY; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED. (DISC302)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF DISMISSAL AND PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100032579) FILED BY DEFENDANT BAXTER, RYAN CHRISTOPHER PAGANINI ELECTRIC CORP.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-03-2018 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-05-2017 Set For Trial On May-21-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Subpoenas For Production Of Employment Records
Off Calendar Oct-25-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Tiega N. Varlack of the law offices of Varlack Legal Services (510-397-2008) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, Jazmine Pelayo of the law offices of Bullard Brown & Beal LLP (714-578-4050) appears as counsel for defendant/opposing party

Stipulation and order appointing judge pro tem is signed and filed.

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides. The Court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF DAVID REMSING'S Motion To Quash Subpoenas For Production Of Employment Records is GRANTED in part, DENIED in part and STIPULATED in part. Plaintiff shall produce any and all documents relating to his physical ability or limitations to perform his duties from commencement of employment, including job application to the end of employment. The motion is denied as to the remainder of the personnel file. The parties stipulate in open court to production of payroll records, 1099 forms, attendance records and any workman's compensation records. The Court orders compliance within 21 days of entry of written order. Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312. The [proposed] order shall be submitted by email in Word (.doc) format, directly to the judge pro tem at: ngray@shadesofgray.law.

Judge Pro Tem: Naomi Jane Gray; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (DISC302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2017 Set For Trial On Jan-08-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jul-05-2017 Off Calendar

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Feb-22-2017 Denied
